question: Will kkr win ipl 26
textDescription:
Resolution criteria

This market will resolve to YES if the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) win the final of the 2026 Indian Premier League (IPL) tournament. Otherwise, it will resolve to NO.

Resolution will be based on the official results published by the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) on the official IPL website: https://www.iplt20.com/.

Background

The 2026 Indian Premier League, the 19th edition of the tournament, is scheduled to run from March 28 to May 31, 2026. The Kolkata Knight Riders enter the season looking to add to their history as three-time IPL champions. The team is led by captain Ajinkya Rahane and coached by Abhishek Nayar.

The 2026 KKR squad includes high-profile acquisitions such as Cameron Green, who was signed for a record-breaking fee, and Matheesha Pathirana, although the team faced early-season challenges regarding player fitness and availability. KKR plays its home matches at Eden Gardens, Kolkata.
